title: Sociology Mission and Vision
content:
Sociology Mission and Vision

Mission:

To procure sociologists who can interpret and understand Turkey’s and world’s social reality, produce solutions towards this direction, be respectful to ethical values and be socially sensitive.

Vision:

To produce information on the production of social, cultural, political and economic policies for the detection and resolution of social problems by conducting research on the functioning of society and it’s rapidly changing dynamics.
